name: Browser Relay
description: Drive your real, logged-in browser via a companion Chrome extension over a local CDP relay. The extension dials the relay's /extension endpoint; the built-in browser tool connects to /cdp through a cdpUrl profile.

port.description: Loopback CDP relay port (default 18792). The extension connects to /extension and the browser tool connects to /cdp on this port. Currently also settable via OPENCLAW_BROWSER_RELAY_PORT.

bindHost.description: Bind address. Default loopback. Set a non-loopback address only for remote/WSL2 setups that expose /extension. Currently also settable via OPENCLAW_BROWSER_RELAY_BIND_HOST.
